company.name: Johnson & Johnson — Innovative Medicines (Pharma)
company.subtitle: Pharma-only model | $60.5B 2025 IM revenue | Stelara $6.1B (-41% LOE) | Tremfya/Darzalex/Caplyta growth | Carvykti 50/50 LEGN | Nipocalimab multi-indication
company.cashRunway: Self-funding ($25B+ op cash flow); Pharma segment only modeled (excludes MedTech ~$32B)

market.notes: First-in-class IL-12/23 anti-p40 mAb. Composition LOE Sep 2023 US; biosimilars launched 2024-25 (Wezlana Amgen, Selarsdi Alvotech, Pyzchiva Samsung, Imuldosa Accord, Otulfi Fresenius, Steqeyma Celltrion, 7+ total). Sharp decline trajectory: $10.4B (2024) -> $6.1B (2025) -> ~$2.5B (2026E) -> <$1B (2027E).

us.reachPct.note: Stelara ~8% US psoriasis biologic + UC/CD pool 2025 (declining vs biosim erosion).

market.notes: IL-23 selective (anti-p19) succeeding Stelara. PsO largest indication ~42% of brand. Class peers: Skyrizi (AbbVie), Ilumya (Sun Pharma).
PsA approved 2020. ~21% of Tremfya brand.
UC approved 2024 (QUASAR Ph3 positive). ~25% of Tremfya brand growing.
CD approved 2025 (GRAVITI Ph3 positive). ~12% of Tremfya brand, fastest growth.
1L MM Dara+VRd quad-combo (PERSEUS Ph3 transplant-eligible, CEPHEUS transplant-ineligible). ~$7B 2025 1L portion.
2L-3L MM combos. ~$5.5B 2025.
4L+ R/R MM Darzalex monotherapy + combos. ~$1.85B 2025 (declining as Carvykti/Tecvayli/Talvey take share).

assets.name: Carvykti (cilta-cel, BCMA CAR-T) — w/ Legend 50/50
assets.stage: Commercial ($1.0B JNJ-share 2025; LEGN books complementary $1B = $1.9B franchise)

market.notes: BCMA CAR-T autologous. JNJ books gross sales in US/EU/ROW (its commercial territory); LEGN books China gross + collaboration share. Total franchise 2025 ~$1.9B (50/50 economics ex-China). JNJ-reported share $963M 2025 (rounded $1B). CARTITUDE-4 2L+ approved 2024; CARTITUDE-5/6 1L MM Ph3 readouts 2026-27 -- transformational if positive.

us.reachPct.note: Carvykti JNJ share ~4% of US R/R MM (LEGN holds complementary ~50% economic share separately in our model). 50/50 split: see LEGN config for the matching franchise share.

us.priceK.note: $530K WAC -- premium autologous CAR-T pricing parity (Yescarta $464K base, manufacturing premium).

market.notes: BCMA x CD3 bispecific. R/R MM 4L+. ~$549M 2025. Combo Ph3 readouts 2026-27.
First-in-class GPRC5D x CD3 bispecific. R/R MM. Differentiated from BCMA-class. ~$425M 2025.
Second-gen AR antagonist. SPARTAN nmCRPC + TITAN mHSPC. ~$3.4B 2025 (+15%). Class peers: Xtandi (Astellas/PFE), Nubeqa (Bayer).
First-in-class BTK. 50/50 with AbbVie. Declining -8%/yr (Calquence + Brukinsa share war + pirtobrutinib competing). JNJ books US, AbbVie books ROW with profit-share. ~$2.8B 2025 JNJ portion.
EGFR x MET bispecific (Rybrevant) + 3rd-gen EGFR TKI (Lazcluze). MARIPOSA 1L positive vs Tagrisso. PALOMA-3 SC formulation. ~$700M 2025 ramping.

us.reachPct.note: Rybrevant+Lazcluze ~6% EGFR+ NSCLC pool (Tagrisso AZN dominant).

market.notes: Pan-FGFR oral. THOR Ph3 confirmatory. Niche FGFR3+ bladder ~20% of urothelial.
Intranasal esketamine NMDA antagonist. TRD + MDD with suicidal ideation. ~$1.6B 2025 (+50%). REMS-controlled.
Paliperidone palmitate long-acting injectable (1mo/3mo/6mo). Schizo + schizoaffective. ~$4B 2025. LOE Sustenna 2024 partial; Trinza/Hafyera longer.

us.reachPct.note: Invega LAI ~30% US schizophrenia LAI pool.

market.notes: Atypical antipsychotic. Schizo + bipolar I/II depression. Acquired via Intra-Cellular $14.6B Apr 2025. ~$700M 2025 partial-year. MDD label expansion sBLA H2 2026.
Methylphenidate ER. Long off-patent; brand remnants. ~$500M 2025.
Endothelin receptor antagonist (ERA). 1L + maintenance PAH. ~$2.18B 2025 (+13%).

us.reachPct.note: Opsumit ~22% US PAH pool (ERA class leader).

market.notes: Oral IP receptor agonist for PAH (prostacyclin pathway). ~$1.85B 2025.

assets.name: Xarelto (rivaroxaban, anti-Xa) — w/ Bayer; US LOE Nov 2025

market.notes: Direct Factor Xa inhibitor. JNJ books US (~50% of class), Bayer books ROW. US LOE Nov 2025; collapse 2026.

us.reachPct.note: Xarelto JNJ-share ~7% US AF/VTE pool (declining post Nov 2025 LOE).

market.notes: Single-tablet darunavir-based regimen for treatment-experienced HIV. Niche vs INSTI-based STRs (Biktarvy GILD dominant).
Edurant ~$200M (declining HIV NNRTI). Vocabria/Cabenuva LA HIV (cabotegravir, ViiV/GSK majority) ~$600M JNJ portion via royalty.

us.reachPct.note: JNJ HIV legacy ~3% US treatment pool.

indications.name: Remicade (infliximab) + Simponi (golimumab) — RA + UC + CD + AS + PsA

market.notes: Anti-TNF mAbs. Remicade (long biosimilar pressure) + Simponi/Aria. Declining ~5%/yr. RA + IBD + AS + PsA across both.

us.reachPct.note: Remicade+Simponi branded ~3% TNFi class pool (biosim pressure).

assets.name: Heritage misc (Zytiga generic + Risperdal Consta + Tracleer + others)

indications.name: Heritage tail (Zytiga + Risperdal Consta + Tracleer + small)

market.notes: Heritage tail: Zytiga (abiraterone, fully generic ~$300M tail), Risperdal Consta (~$300M declining), Tracleer (bosentan ~$100M), Procrit/Eprex (epoetin ~$200M, declining), small alliance + ROW. ~$1.2B. True heterogeneous tail tagged as pseudo-area.

assets.name: Imaavy (nipocalimab, anti-FcRn) — multi-indication franchise
assets.stage: Approved gMG Apr 2025; sBLA wAIHA Feb 2026; multiple Ph3 ongoing

market.notes: Anti-FcRn mAb. Approved gMG Apr 2025 (broad label incl. peds). ~$200M 2025 ramp. Class peer: Vyvgart (Argenx FcRn, dominant), Ultomiris (AZN C5).
GARDENIA Ph3 SLE post-positive JASMINE Ph2b. Class peer: Saphnelo (AZN IFN-α), Benlysta (GSK BAFF). Major potential franchise.
Nipocalimab CIDP Ph3. Class peer: Vyvgart Hytrulo (Argenx, approved Jun 2024), Riliprubart (Sanofi anti-C1s Ph3).

assets.name: Icotrokinra (JNJ-2113) — oral IL-23 peptide
assets.stage: Phase 3 ICONIC positive psoriasis; NDA submitted

market.notes: First oral IL-23 peptide. ICONIC Ph3 plaque pso positive. NDA filed; 2026 approval expected. Differentiation: oral convenience vs injectables (Stelara/Tremfya/Skyrizi/Cosentyx).

us.reachPct.note: Icotrokinra ~6% PsO pool by peak (oral expansion).

mega_bear.narrative: Stelara cliff continues + Tremfya growth slows + Carvykti 1L disappoints + nipocalimab Ph3 misses
events: X Stelara erodes faster than expected (full cliff by 2027)
X Tremfya CD/UC growth flatlines vs Skyrizi competition
X Carvykti CARTITUDE-5/6 1L MM disappoints
X Nipocalimab SLE Ph3 misses
X Caplyta MDD label expansion delayed
X Xarelto US LOE Nov 2025 hits as expected
-> Stock to $190-200 (Pharma cliff preview)

bear.narrative: Stelara cliff + steady growth from successors + select pipeline wins
events: ~ Stelara erodes to <$2B by 2027
~ Tremfya hits $9B 2030
~ Carvykti CARTITUDE-5 1L MM positive
~ Nipocalimab MG ramp + CIDP positive
~ Caplyta MDD approved 2026
~ Icotrokinra approved psoriasis

base.narrative: Tremfya hits $10B+ + Carvykti 1L positive + Nipocalimab multi-indication + Caplyta franchise
events: V Tremfya $11B+ peak across 4 indications
V Carvykti CARTITUDE-5/6 1L MM Ph3 positive (transformational)
V Nipocalimab MG ramp + SLE Ph3 + CIDP all positive
V Caplyta MDD approved 2026; $3B+ peak
V Icotrokinra captures meaningful share of oral psoriasis
V Darzalex maintains share through next decade

bull.narrative: Tremfya $13B+ + Nipocalimab >$5B multi-indication + Carvykti $5B+ + ADCs deliver
events: V Tremfya $13B+ across 4 indications + label expansion
V Nipocalimab >$5B across MG + SLE + CIDP + Sjögren's + IIM
V Carvykti 1L MM transformational; $5B+ JNJ-share
V Tecvayli + Talvey combos $3B+ combined
V Caplyta MDD + bipolar reaches $5B+
V Icotrokinra oral IL-23 dominates oral PsO market

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance + Tremfya $15B+ + Nipocalimab $8B+ + Carvykti 1L blockbuster + transformative pipeline
events: V Tremfya $15B+ across 4 indications
V Nipocalimab $8B+ across 5+ indications -- new biggest franchise
V Carvykti 1L MM transforms space; $8B+ JNJ-share
V Caplyta franchise reaches $7B across schizo/bipolar/MDD
V Multiple expansion to peak premium pharma multiples

lastData.title: Pharma-only model. FY2025 IM $60.5B. Q1'26 +11% IM. Stelara cliff vs Tremfya/Darzalex/Caplyta growth.
points: Q1 2026: IM $15.4B (+11.2% op); 2026 guide raised to $100.8B total / EPS $11.55
Carvykti $963M JNJ share ($1.9B total franchise w/ LEGN 50/50)
Caplyta partial-year ~$700M post Intra-Cellular $14.6B Apr 2025 close
Imaavy (nipocalimab) approved gMG Apr 2025; multi-indication Ph3 program
Icotrokinra (oral IL-23 peptide) NDA filed; 2026 PsO approval expected

nextCatalyst.title: Caplyta MDD approval + Icotrokinra PsO approval + Nipocalimab wAIHA + CARTITUDE 1L readouts
thresholds: H2 2026: Caplyta MDD label expansion sBLA decision

risks: Stelara biosimilar cliff: $10.4B 2024 -> $6.1B 2025 -> ~$2.5B 2026 -> <$1B 2027 (largest pharma cliff currently)
Tremfya competitive vs Skyrizi (AbbVie) IL-23 class -- needs to capture full Stelara succession
Nipocalimab Vyvgart (Argenx) competition in MG/CIDP -- pricing + label scope
Carvykti 1L expansion (CARTITUDE-5/6) is binary; 4L+ alone limits market
Tecvayli/Talvey combinations needed to differentiate vs Carvykti + competing bispecifics (REGN linvoseltamab)
Caplyta acquisition $14.6B -- needs >$5B peak to justify
Imbruvica competitive losses to Calquence (AZN) + Brukinsa (BeiGene) + pirtobrutinib (LLY) ongoing

Carvykti revenue allocation: this model uses JNJ-reported $1B (50% economic share); LEGN config has complementary $1B (LEGN's 50% share). Total franchise ~$1.9B reflected across both configs; Market Explorer aggregation correctly captures the combined franchise without double-counting

catalysts.title: Icotrokinra (JNJ-2113) PsO PDUFA — first oral IL-23 peptide
catalysts._rationale: ICONIC Ph3 positive; NDA filed; standard 10-month review.

catalysts.title: Caplyta MDD label expansion sBLA decision
catalysts._rationale: Ph3 MDD positive (Intra-Cellular legacy); sBLA review.

catalysts.title: Nipocalimab wAIHA approval (sBLA Feb 2026)
catalysts._rationale: ENERGY Ph3 wAIHA positive; sBLA filed Feb 2026.

catalysts.title: Carvykti CARTITUDE-5/-6 1L MM Ph3 readouts (transformational)
catalysts._rationale: 1L MM Ph3 transition trials; if positive, transforms BCMA CAR-T from R/R to 1L (massive TAM expansion).

catalysts.title: Nipocalimab GARDENIA SLE Ph3 readout
catalysts._rationale: GARDENIA Ph3 SLE post JASMINE Ph2b positive.

catalysts.title: Xarelto US LOE — generic rivaroxaban launch
